name: Fairhaven
seasonal_change: Town rhythm follows agricultural cycles and the waxing danger of celestial/glyph disturbances.
seasonal_effects: Town rhythm follows agricultural cycles and the waxing danger of celestial/glyph disturbances.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
